body:
Good Morning, Alexandria Friends! Happy Thursday!

So, as I mentioned yesterday, today through Sunday this week are kinda my extended weekend. The plan is to pretty much spend the next 4 days Door Dashing. I know most likely will be no fiction today, we’ll see where I am regarding the next few days when we get there.

I did post another in my music series yesterday. So if you need a bit of a fix, here’s what I’ve got:

Zolita - Bedspell
Dove Cameron - Boyfriend
Sizzy Rocket - Bestie
Zolita - Like Heaven
reblog_comment:
Good Morning, Alexandria Friends! Happy Thursday!

So, as I mentioned yesterday, today through Sunday this week are kinda my extended weekend. The plan is to pretty much spend the next 4 days Door Dashing. I know most likely will be no fiction today, we’ll see where I am regarding the next few days when we get there.

I did post another in my music series yesterday. So if you need a bit of a fix, here’s what I’ve got:

Zolita - Bedspell
Dove Cameron - Boyfriend
Sizzy Rocket - Bestie
Zolita - Like Heaven
Tracy Chapman - Fast Car

I’ll be around off and on, but probably not as much as usual. So I hope you all have a wonderful day and take care of each other! 🖤
